---
title: "Marie Holzaht"
categories: "K. Pfau"
image: 20251014_P_Holzaht_Marie_RM_0579.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Marie Holzaht joined our group to work on a project about atrophy and its progression in Pseudoxanthoma elasticum (PXE). This project will serve as the basis for her doctoral degree (Dr. med.).

## Education

University of Bonn | Bonn, Germany
Medical Degree (MD) | ongoing
